MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Berge for and with Gordon Anduha.

Mr. Berge stated that the Inventory and Appraisal had now been signed. The matter was continued to December 30, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Guitron.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor to appear and show why he/she should not be removed for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is November 19, 2008 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.
